# Bawabah Library
A simple TypeScript/JavaScript library for interacting with the Bawabah API.


## Features
- Initialize with app credentials
- Capture session data from Bawabah API
- Type-safe responses
- Colored error messages for better debugging


## Installation

```
npm i bawabah
```


## Usage

### TypeScript / ES Module
```typescript
import Bawabah from 'bawabah';

const bw = new Bawabah();
bw.init({ appId: 'your-app-id', appSecret: 'your-app-secret' });

const result = await bw.capture('user-session-id');
console.log(result);
```


### CommonJS
```javascript
const Bawabah = require('bawabah').default;

const bw = new Bawabah();
bw.init({ appId: 'your-app-id', appSecret: 'your-app-secret' });

bw.capture('user-session-id').then(console.log);
```

## API

### `init({ appId, appSecret })`
Initializes the library with your credentials.

### `capture(sessionId)`
Fetches session data from the Bawabah API.

#### CaptureResponse
```
{
  openId: string;
  displayname: string | null;
  avatar: string | null;
  method: {
    type: "email" | "whatsapp";
    value: string;
  };
}
```
